description: Style NoteThis force 10 shoe is a comfortable lifestyle shoe that performs well even when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies! Product DetailsBlunt toed casual shoe in chocolate brown with central lace-up systemSynthetic suede upper Padded collar and tongue Lightweight rubber outsole with grooves and lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a clean, dry cloth
